name: normal
text: Customers in Kuwait City are seeing dropped 5G sessions after a radio stack refresh. The team suspects handover failures and wants the next actions.

name: noisy
text: Huge alarm burst after planned maintenance and several duplicate events are flooding the NMS. Need priority, likely cause, and what to do first.

name: failure
text: Not enough data. A few users report intermittent issues and the logs are incomplete. What should the copilot do when the evidence is weak?
